summary: The notebook has two notes: a foundations course note on gradient descent and a reading note on the Transformer paper, spanning machine-learning and deep-learning areas.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: One course note covers gradient descent basics: the update rule, a worked quadratic example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: Momentum, Adam, and other refined optimizers are referenced as next steps but not yet written up.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: A structured reading note covers the Transformer's self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and WMT 2014 results.
areas.gap: Sub-quadratic attention, improved positional schemes, and training-stability topics are flagged as improvements but have no dedicated notes.
